title: Skills Are Not Islands: Measuring Dependency and Risk in Agent Skill Supply Chains

version_check.method: canonical arXiv v1 abstract HTML and local PDF metadata

release_audit.evidence: The complete v1 paper and canonical abstract page provide no repository, dataset, benchmark, analyzer, SkillBOM schema, annotation guideline, crawl snapshot, or result-table artifact URL. Exact-title and exact-tool web searches found only the paper and third-party summaries, not an author-owned release.
release_audit.consequence: SKILL-DEP labels, SDA code/configuration, SkillBOM schema, SkillsMP snapshot, extracted graphs, security matches, manual confirmations, and developer reports could not be independently inspected or replayed.
